song.title: In The Garden
song.author: C. Austin Miles
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I come to the garden alone, While the dew is still on the roses; And the voice I hear falling on my ear, The Son of God discloses. [C] Chorus And He walks with me, And He talks with me, And He tells me I am His own; And the joy we share as we tarry there, None other has ever known.
[V2] 2) He speaks, and the sound of His voice Is so sweet the birds hush their singing; And the melody that He gave to me, Within my heart is ringing.
[V3] 3) I'd stay in the garden with Him, Though the night around me be falling; But He bids me go; Thru the voice of woe, His voice to me is calling.
